title: At least 18 dead as Russia launches massive drone and missile attack on Kyiv
summary_full: Ukraine capital targeted as Russia faces fuel shortages following long-range strikes against its oil refineriesEurope live – latest updatesAt least 18 people have been killed and dozens injured overnight in Kyiv, local authorities have said, as Russia launched its latest massive drone and missile attack on the Ukrainian capital.Fires were burning at sites across the capital as dawn broke on Thursday, with strikes or debris hitting residential buildings in several districts and a hotel on one of Kyiv’s central boulevards. The death toll may rise, as local emergency services said 86 people were injured, 70 of whom had been hospitalised. Continue reading...
